tasks.name: Create QuickActionItem type interface
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interface for individual quick action items with icon, title, description, href, and optional priority

constraints: Must export interface QuickActionItem with required and optional fields
Icon should be string (icon name from lucide-react)
All fields properly typed with JSDoc comments

tasks.input_state: dashboard-types.ts exists with DashboardData interface from S1864.I1.F1. No QuickActionItem type defined yet.
tasks.output_state: QuickActionItem interface added to dashboard-types.ts with fields: icon (string), title (string), description (string), href (string), priority (optional number).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: QuickActionItem interface exists in dashboard-types.ts with all required fields, TypeScript compiles without errors.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export interface QuickActionItem' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-types.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.name: Create useQuickActions hook with parallel data fetching
tasks.purpose: Implement React Query hook that fetches course_progress, tasks, and survey_progress in parallel using Promise.all

constraints: Use Promise.all for parallel fetching (60-80% faster)
Return isLoading, error, and actions array
Handle graceful degradation if tables have no data
Use 'use client' directive

tasks.input_state: QuickActionItem type exists from T1. No useQuickActions hook exists. Course_progress, tasks, and survey_progress tables exist with RLS.
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/hooks/use-quick-actions.ts exists with hook that queries 3 tables in parallel, returns { isLoading, error, actions: QuickActionItem[] }.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Hook file exists at correct path, uses Promise.all for parallel fetching, returns properly typed data, TypeScript compiles without errors.

tasks.name: Add action derivation logic to useQuickActions
tasks.purpose: Implement conditional logic to derive contextual actions based on data presence (Continue Course if incomplete lessons, Continue Task if doing tasks, Complete Assessment if not done, New Presentation always)

dependencies: Fetched data from T2 (course_progress, tasks, survey_progress)
constraints: Continue Course: show if current_lesson_id exists in course_progress
Continue Task: show if tasks with status='doing' exist
Complete Assessment: show if survey_progress is null/incomplete
New Presentation: always show as default action
Ensure at least 2 actions always returned
Return max 4 actions in 2x2 grid

tasks.input_state: useQuickActions hook exists from T2 with parallel data fetching but no action derivation logic. Hook returns raw data.
tasks.output_state: useQuickActions hook includes deriveActions() function that maps fetched data to QuickActionItem[] array based on conditional rules. Returns 2-4 contextual actions with default fallbacks.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Hook returns 2-4 QuickActionItem objects based on data state, includes default actions when no contextual ones apply, TypeScript compiles without errors.

tasks.name: Create QuickActionsPanel component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Create client component that renders 2x2 grid layout with CardButton placeholders for quick actions

constraints: Use 'use client' directive
2x2 grid layout (grid-cols-2 gap-4)
Responsive: single column on mobile, 2 columns on tablet+
No interactive handlers yet (added in T5/T6)

tasks.input_state: useQuickActions hook exists from T2/T3. No QuickActionsPanel component exists. CardButton components available in @kit/ui.
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx exists with client component rendering Card wrapper, grid layout, and CardButton placeholders. Component calls useQuickActions hook.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists at correct path, renders 2x2 grid layout, displays placeholder CardButtons, TypeScript compiles without errors.
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && grep -q 'use client' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.name: Add icon and content rendering to QuickActionsPanel
tasks.purpose: Populate CardButton components with icons, titles, and descriptions from QuickActionItem data

dependencies: lucide-react icons (import dynamically or use specific icons)
constraints: Map over actions array from useQuickActions
Display icon using lucide-react dynamic import
Render title in CardButtonTitle
Render description in CardButtonContent
No href/onClick handlers yet (added in T6)

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel skeleton exists from T4 with grid layout but placeholder content. useQuickActions returns QuickActionItem[] with icon, title, description, href.
tasks.output_state: QuickActionsPanel component maps over actions array and renders each action's icon, title, and description in CardButton structure. Content is visible but not yet interactive.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component displays icons, titles, and descriptions for each action, content matches QuickActionItem data, TypeScript compiles without errors.

tasks.name: Wire CardButton navigation to action hrefs
tasks.purpose: Connect each CardButton to its destination URL using Next.js Link component for client-side navigation

constraints: Use CardButton with asChild prop
Wrap with Link component
href from action.href field
Preserve icon/title/description rendering from T5

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel from T5 displays content but buttons are not interactive. CardButton supports asChild pattern for Link wrapping.
tasks.output_state: Each CardButton wrapped with Link component using asChild pattern. Clicking action navigates to correct destination URL via client-side routing.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: CardButtons wrapped with Link, clicking navigates to correct URL, navigation is client-side (no full page reload), TypeScript compiles without errors.

tasks.name: Add skeleton loading state to QuickActionsPanel
tasks.purpose: Display skeleton placeholders while useQuickActions data is loading to prevent layout shift

constraints: Show 4 skeleton CardButtons in 2x2 grid during loading
Match height and layout of actual CardButtons
Use Skeleton component for title and description areas
Prevent layout shift when data loads

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel from T6 displays actions when loaded but has no loading state. Shows nothing or error during fetch.
tasks.output_state: QuickActionsPanel displays 4 skeleton CardButton placeholders when isLoading=true. Skeleton layout matches actual CardButton dimensions and grid structure.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component shows skeleton placeholders during loading, no layout shift when data appears, TypeScript compiles without errors.

tasks.name: Integrate QuickActionsPanel into dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Import and place QuickActionsPanel component in dashboard page grid layout at correct position

constraints: Add import for QuickActionsPanel
Place in row 2, position 2 (per spec layout: 3-3-1 grid)
Ensure grid responsive classes apply correctly
Widget appears in correct position on all breakpoints

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page from S1864.I1.F2 has grid layout from S1864.I1.F3. QuickActionsPanel component complete from T7 but not integrated into page.
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page imports and renders QuickActionsPanel in correct grid position. Widget appears at row 2, position 2 in desktop layout, stacks appropriately on mobile/tablet.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: QuickActionsPanel visible on dashboard page at /home route, positioned correctly in grid layout, responsive behavior works, TypeScript compiles without errors.
